flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at University of Chicago rose 14% between 2021 and 2024 ($62.2k → $70.7k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at University of Chicago rose 14% between 2021 and 2024 ($62.2k → $70.7k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at University of Chicago fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.5% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at University of Chicago are 57% above the private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer median ($91.9k vs $58.7k).
